Job OverviewWe are seeking a highly skilled and motivated iOS Sr. Software Engineer to join the team powering the T-Life app—T-Mobile's flagship mobile experience. In this role, you will contribute to the design, development, and delivery of high-quality, performant, and AI-enabled iOS features that reach millions of users.The Sr. Software Engineer is essential for designing, implementing, and deploying scalable mobile software solutions that meet customer requirements and support high-availability environments. This role focuses on iOS application development within established architecture, collaborating with cross-functional engineering teams to build modern, reliable features and integrate backend services—including AI-powered capabilities. Success is measured by the ability to deliver dependable technical solutions, produce clear documentation, and contribute to continuous improvement and innovation that enhances customer experience and supports business goals.

results.title: Sreerangam Gokulnath
highlights:
Senior AI ML Engineer at [T-Mobile](https://www.linkedin.com/company/t-mobile)
...
I am a Senior AI and Machine Learning Engineer with 11+ years of experience building and scaling Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI systems across financial services, healthcare, telecommunications, and public sector organizations. Over the years, I have worked on solving complex business problems such as fraud detection, credit risk assessment, regulatory compliance, and intelligent data-driven decision systems. I enjoy taking these challenges and turning them into practical, scalable AI solutions that create real impact in production environments. My work focuses on the end-to-end machine learning lifecycle, including data ingestion, feature engineering, model development, deployment, monitoring, and governance. In recent years, I have been deeply involved in Generative AI and LLM-based systems, building solutions using RAG architectures, vector databases, embeddings, and prompt engineering to enable intelligent document processing, semantic search, and enterprise knowledge retrieval. I have also designed agentic AI workflows and multi-step reasoning systems, focusing not only on performance but also on explainability, reliability, and production readiness. I strongly believe that effective AI systems should be trustworthy, interpretable, and aligned with real business needs. From a technology perspective, I have hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, and GCP, along with tools such as SageMaker, Vertex AI, Apache Spark, Kafka, Airflow, Docker, and Kubernetes. I have built and supported both real-time and batch inference systems, with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and cost efficiency. I enjoy working closely with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineering teams, helping translate complex AI outputs into clear and actionable insights. The most rewarding part of my work is turning ideas and prototypes into production-grade systems that deliver measurable value. Core Expertise: Generative AI, Large Language Models LLMs, Retrieval-Augmented Generation RAG, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Prompt Engineering, Agentic AI, Vector Databases Pinecone FAISS, Embeddings, Semantic Search, XGBoost, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Apache Spark, Kafka, MLflow, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Azure, GCPcuracy, operational efficiency, risk transparency, and organizational trust in AI driven systems.
...
### Senior AI ML Engineer at [T-Mobile](https://www.linkedin.com/company/t-mobile) (Current)
...
Senior AI ML Engineer with 11 plus years of experience designing and deploying scalable artificial intelligence, machine learning, and generative AI solutions across telecommunications, financial services, healthcare, and public sector environments. Currently working with T-Mobile, I focus on building production grade AI systems including large language models, retrieval augmented generation pipelines, and real time machine learning platforms using AWS and modern MLOps frameworks. At T-Mobile, I have been involved in developing large scale fraud detection and analytics systems, processing millions of telecom transactions daily and enabling real time decision making. My experience spans the full machine learning lifecycle including data ingestion, feature engineering, model training, deployment, monitoring, and optimization across distributed systems. I have hands on expertise in Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, vector databases, and cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure, along with designing scalable architectures using microservices, Kafka, Spark, and Kubernetes. I am focused on delivering measurable business impact by improving model accuracy, reducing latency, and enabling data driven decision making across enterprise platforms. Passionate about Generative AI and intelligent automation, I continuously work on building scalable AI systems that drive innovation, enhance operational efficiency, and solve complex real world problems.

results.title: Reginald Barnabas
highlights:
Engineering Lead | Applied AI Architect | Multi-Surface | LLM · RAG · Agentic AI | Building Intelligent Systems at T-Mobile
...
Senior Software Engineer - AI Platforms & Engineering Lead at [T-Mobile](https://www.linkedin.com/company/t-mobile)
...
I sit at the intersection of software engineering, AI systems design, and enterprise architecture - building production-grade intelligent systems that turn raw operational noise into actionable insight. Over the past year, I led the full-stack design and delivery of MIRA (Multi Incident Resolution Assistant) - T-Mobile’s AI-powered incident intelligence platform - from foundational deployment to a mature agentic system processing 50K+ real-world incidents with sub-15-minute MTTR. • LLM-powered pipelines - Built Multi-stage AI analysis across 33K+ incidents from triage through root cause inference • RAG systems - knowledge retrieval over 1,000+ docs and 46 repos using vector search and semantic embeddings • Agentic workflows - parallel tool execution with LLM reasoning across 25+ custom tools • Full-stack platforms - end-to-end systems spanning 4 code parsers and 46 repos from data layer to user-facing interfaces • Multi-system integrations - 7 enterprise integrations connecting AI platforms to tooling and observability stacks $6M+ in cost savings and a system that fundamentally changed how T-Mobile engineers respond to production incidents. I also currently lead the T-Life Backend team with delivery across the HSI, ScamShield, P360, and LifeStyle chapters. Before AI platforms & T-Life, I served as the Dev Lead for T-Mobile Retail Technology - building software integration layers for in-store hardware, including printers, cash drawers, BPK devices, and payment terminals, connected to T-Mobile’s retail POS apps used nationwide. I also architected and owned QuickTicket - a full-stack incident management platform with ServiceNow integration, enabling T-Mobile retail agents to log, track, and resolve store-level IT issues. Beyond AI, I bring 14+ years of full-stack, mobile, and web engineering depth - including micro-frontends, hybrid mobile platforms, PWA, React Native, platform leadership, and enterprise-scale learning systems serving 100K+ daily users. I mentor engineers, drive technical strategy, and thrive in ambiguous spaces where the right architecture has not been invented yet. T-Mobile Spotlight Award - Exceptional Performance, 2021, 2025 T-Mobile Hackathon - Won 1st Place + Bonus Prize, T-Mobile CED/PXDI Create-A-Thon 2025. Led team PromptStorm to build FastTrack Family Onboarding with T-Life - an AI-powered group chat experience that guides families through plan selection and completes their switch to T-Mobile end-to-end inside T-Life.

I build AI systems that don’t just generate outputs where they reason, act, and deliver measurable business value. From multi-agent orchestration using LangGraph and CrewAI to production-grade RAG pipelines powered by Azure OpenAI and AWS Bedrock, I focus on turning complex data into intelligent, scalable solutions. results.title: T Mobile Us Data Scientist Interview Questions & Guide 2026
highlights:
As a **Data Scientist** at **T Mobile Us**, you play a critical role in shaping the future of the "Un-carrier." You will work at the intersection of massive telecommunications data, cutting-edge machine learning, and customer-centric strategy. The insights you generate and the models you build directly impact how **T Mobile Us** optimizes its cellular networks, predicts customer churn, personalizes marketing campaigns, and automates complex business processes.
...
The scale of data at **T Mobile Us** is immense, spanning billions of daily network events, customer interactions, and transaction touchpoints. As a member of the data science team, you will not just analyze historical trends; you will build predictive systems and deploy artificial intelligence models that drive real-time decision-making. Whether you are optimizing network traffic routing or developing natural language processing models to automate customer service workflows, your work will have a tangible impact on millions of subscribers.
...
### Machine Learning & AI System Design
...
These questions assess your ability to design end-to-end machine learning systems and automate complex workflows using modern AI techniques.
...
* Explain how you would deploy a machine learning model to predict customer churn in real time.
...
* What is your approach to integrating large language models or external APIs into an existing data pipeline?
...
Preparing for a **Data Scientist** interview at **T Mobile Us** requires a balanced approach that addresses both theoretical knowledge and practical execution. You should not only brush up on core machine learning algorithms but also practice structuring your thoughts aloud during case studies and system design discussions.
...

As a **Data Scientist** at **T Mobile Us**, your daily work will be highly dynamic, bridging the gap between advanced technical execution and strategic business impact. You will be responsible for translating raw telecommunications data into intelligent, automated systems.
...
Your primary responsibilities will center around building and deploying predictive models. You will design, train, and validate machine learning algorithms to solve complex business challenges, such as optimizing network performance, predicting customer behaviors, and identifying operational inefficiencies. You will also spend significant time developing automated workflows, utilizing natural language processing and modern AI techniques to streamline internal tasks like event tagging and customer ticket routing.
...
To be competitive for a **Data Scientist** position at **T Mobile Us**, you must demonstrate a strong foundation in quantitative analysis, software development, and machine learning systems.

# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
...
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.
...
- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager.
